record.field: # Inline purchase order creation to avoid depending on model method availability for rec in records: if not rec.supplier_id: raise Exception('No supplier configured for booking %s' % (rec.name or str(rec.id))) PurchaseOrder = env['purchase.order'] PurchaseLine = env['purchase.order.line'] Product = env['product.product'] uom_unit = env.ref('uom.product_uom_unit', raise_if_not_found=False) product = Product.search([('name', '=', 'Air Tickets')], limit=1) if not product: product = Product.create({ 'name': 'Air Tickets', 'type': 'service', 'purchase_ok': True, 'invoice_policy': 'order', 'list_price': 0.0, }) desc_lines = [ ('Carrier code: %s' % (rec.carrier_code or '')), ('Ticket No: %s' % (rec.ticket_no or '')), ('PNR: %s' % (rec.pnr or '')), ('Passenger: %s' % (rec.passenger_name or '')), ('Travel date: %s' % (rec.travel_date or '')), ] description = '\n'.join(desc_lines) po_vals = { 'partner_id': rec.supplier_id.id, 'origin': (rec.name or False), } po = PurchaseOrder.create(po_vals) # safe_eval environment does not provide getattr; use direct attribute access price_for_supplier = rec.net_payable_to_supplier if rec.net_payable_to_supplier is not None else (rec.airline_total or 0.0) line_vals = { 'order_id': po.id, 'product_id': product.id, 'name': description, 'product_qty': 1.0, 'product_uom_id': (product.uom_id.id if product.uom_id else (uom_unit.id if uom_unit else False)), 'price_unit': price_for_supplier, } allowed = set(PurchaseLine._fields.keys()) filtered = {k: v for k, v in line_vals.items() if k in allowed} PurchaseLine.create([filtered]) try: po.button_confirm() except Exception: try: po.action_confirm() except Exception: pass last_po = po action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'res_model': 'purchase.order', 'res_id': last_po.id, 'view_mode': 'form', 'target': 'current', }
